## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR does and why -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)

## Related issues

<!-- Link related issues: "Fixes #123" or "Relates to #456" -->

## Testing

<!-- Describe how you tested this change -->

- [ ] `npm test` passes (116/116)
- [ ] `npm run lint` is clean
- [ ] `npm run check` (tsc) is clean
- [ ] Manually tested the change end-to-end
- [ ] Updated `skills/localnest-mcp/SKILL.md` if any tool changed
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]`

## Backwards compatibility

- [ ] No breaking changes to existing MCP tool names or schemas
- [ ] Schema migrations are additive only (no DROP/ALTER)
- [ ] Existing CLI commands behavior preserved

## Additional notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, alternatives considered, follow-ups -->
